title: cyperus × hybridus
intro: Cyperus × hybridus, also known as umbrella sedge or umbrella papyrus, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is native to Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, making it a popular ingredient in traditional remedies. The health benefits of Cyperus × hybridus include its potential to treat a range of ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a powder or made into a tea, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
